# drawsBackground()

**Instance Method**

Returns whether the composition picker view draws its background.

## Declaration

```swift
@MainActor func drawsBackground() -> Bool
```

## Return Value

[doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/true] if the composition picker view draws its background; otherwise [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/false].

## Managing Background Drawing

- **setDrawsBackground(_:)**: Sets whether the composition picker view draws its background.
